content: 155+ agents inheriting Agent9999 from agents/agent_base.py. Delta9 (A01-L08): 56 core pipeline. Delta999: 12 advanced engines. Copilot agents: 64 specialized. Superpower: 13 orchestration. Convergence: 10 hardening. Contract: run() → AgentResult(agent_id, status, stats). 7-layer error protocol. 120s deadman switch.
